reason: The pam_pwquality module's difok parameter controls how many characters in a new password must be different from the old password. If difok is too low, an attacker can more easily guess passwords via brute-force or reuse attacks, weakening authentication security.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; filesystems affected; Weak password complexity increases susceptibility to brute-force attacks.; Insufficient password differentiation allows password reuse attacks.
